on the GPS and Galileo systems. To compare the time transfer
accuracy of the three services, three user stations were selected
within the overlapping coverage area of the high-availability
services provided by all three. The National Time Service Cen-
ter (NTSC), a TAI time-keeping laboratory, serves as the central
node, linking IGS stations (ULAB and USUD) to form time
links for time comparison accuracy analysis. The geographic
distribution of the stations and the baseline lengths of the two
time links are shown in Fig. 9.
